name: Sun Blade
description:
This item appears to be a sword hilt.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Blade of Radiance", "entries": ["While grasping the hilt, you can take a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to cause a blade of pure radiance to spring into existence or make the blade disappear. While the blade exists, this magic weapon functions as a Longsword with {@itemProperty F|XPHB|Finesse}. If you are proficient with Longswords or Shortswords, you are proficient with the Sun Blade.", "You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls and
